seo.title: Sushi Menu | Tokyo Club Sushi Speakeasy
seo.description: Explore the Tokyo Club Sushi Speakeasy menu — nigiri, sashimi, signature rolls, craft cocktails, sake, and chef specials. South Beach's finest Japanese dining.

hero.title: The Menu
hero.description: Sushi precision, speakeasy cocktails, and late-night share plates — crafted for the full South Beach night.

image.alt: A dramatic spread of Japanese dishes and cocktails at Tokyo Club Sushi Speakeasy.

footnotes: A 20% service charge and sales tax are added to your check.
*Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.
